message:
fix(3d,css): Fix atom coloring and settings-section layout

3D Viewer:
- Add explicit white base color (0xffffff) to all MeshPhongMaterial
  instances that use vertexColors:true to ensure proper color multiplication
- Fixes black atoms by ensuring vertex colors are multiplied by white
  rather than an undefined/missing color

CSS:
- Add display:flex and flex-direction:column to .settings-section
  so that gap property works correctly

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
